name: Newron Sport
summary: Newron Sport engages in the development and distribution of a patented tandem device, a product that focuses on recreational use and sports. It offers ROLLER HOCKEY PRO that are designed to fit on most ice hockey skate boots; and ROLLER FITNESS PRO, which are designed to fit on most speed skate boots that allows athletes to improve their performance. The company provides ROLLER HOCKEY PRO, ROLLER FITNESS PRO, accessories, and T-shirts online. Newron Sport was formerly known as PURE H20, Inc. and changed its name to Newron Sport in October 2008. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in Sainte-H√É¬©n√É¬©dine, Canada.
